name: Vallourec SA 2.25% NTS 30/09/24 EUR100000
summary: Vallourec SA 2.25% NTS 30/09/24 EUR100000 is a bond issued by Vallourec SA, a French manufacturer of seamless steel tubes and pipes. The bond has a fixed coupon rate and a maturity date of September 30, 2024. Vallourec is headquartered in Boulogne-Billancourt, France.
